steps.t: Elrohir is waiting to speak with you on the road up the hill in Tûr Morva.
Saeradan is north-east of Elrohir, in Tûr Morva. Golodir is up the hill in Tûr Morva. Calenglad is by the entrance to the ruins. Elrohir is pleased th…
Radanir is among the buildings atop the hill in Tûr Morva. Radanir has returned from his expedition in the mountains.
The Rangers have gathered atop the hill in Tûr Morva. You have helped Radanir fight off a small group of the Falcon Clan, and should now give the Grey…
